member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter
member.summary: Represents the correlation filter expression.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Represents the correlation filter expression.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.Properties
member.summary: Dictionary object for custom filters.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.CorrelationId
member.summary: Identifier of the correlation.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.MessageId
member.summary: Identifier of the message.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.SendTo
member.summary: Address to send to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.ReplyTo
member.summary: Address of the queue to reply to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.Subject
member.summary: Application specific label.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.SessionId
member.summary: Session identifier.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.ReplyToSessionId
member.summary: Session identifier to reply to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.ContentType
member.summary: Content type of the message.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusCorrelationFilter.RequiresPreprocessing
member.summary: Value that indicates whether the rule action requires preprocessing.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusEmulatorResource
member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusEmulatorResource.#ctor(Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource)
member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusFilterType
member.summary: Rule filter types.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusFilterType.SqlFilter
member.summary: SqlFilter.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusFilterType.CorrelationFilter
member.summary: CorrelationFilter.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Queue. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource)
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Queue. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.QueueName
member.summary: The queue name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure Service Bus resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure Service Bus Queue.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.DeadLetteringOnMessageExpiration
member.summary: A value that indicates whether this queue has dead letter support when a message expires.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.DefaultMessageTimeToLive
member.summary: ISO 8601 default message timespan to live value. This is the duration after which the message expires, starting from when the message is sent to Service Bus. This is the default value used when TimeToLive is not set on a message itself.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.DuplicateDetectionHistoryTimeWindow
member.summary: ISO 8601 timeSpan structure that defines the duration of the duplicate detection history. The default value is 10 minutes.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.ForwardDeadLetteredMessagesTo
member.summary: Queue/Topic name to forward the Dead Letter message.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.ForwardTo
member.summary: Queue/Topic name to forward the messages.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.LockDuration
member.summary: ISO 8601 timespan duration of a peek-lock; that is, the amount of time that the message is locked for other receivers. The maximum value for LockDuration is 5 minutes; the default value is 1 minute.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.MaxDeliveryCount
member.summary: The maximum delivery count. A message is automatically dead-lettered after this number of deliveries.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.RequiresDuplicateDetection
member.summary: A value indicating if this queue requires duplicate detection.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.RequiresSession
member.summary: A value that indicates whether the queue supports the concept of sessions.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.ToProvisioningEntity
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a provisioning entity.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource.WriteJsonObjectProperties(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter)
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a JSON object.
member.param: The Utf8JsonWriter to write the JSON object to.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Service Bus resource.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure Service Bus resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Represents an Azure Service Bus resource.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure Service Bus resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.ServiceBusEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the "serviceBusEndpoint" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Storage resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.ServiceBusHostName
member.summary: Gets the "serviceBusHostName" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Storage resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.IsEmulator
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Azure Service Bus resource is running in the local emulator.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.HostName
member.summary: Gets the host name for the Service Bus namespace.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.Port
member.summary: Gets the port for the Service Bus namespace.
member.remarks: In container mode, resolves to the container's primary endpoint port. In Azure mode, return null.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the Service Bus namespace.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Service Bus endpoint.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Rule. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Rule. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule.Name
member.summary: The rule name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule.CorrelationFilter
member.summary: Properties of correlation filter.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule.FilterType
member.summary: Filter type that is evaluated against a BrokeredMessage.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule.ToProvisioningEntity
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a provisioning entity.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusRule.WriteJsonObjectProperties(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter)
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a JSON object.
member.param: The Utf8JsonWriter to write the JSON object to.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Subscription. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource)
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Subscription. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.SubscriptionName
member.summary: The subscription name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure Service Bus Topic resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure Service Bus Subscription.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.DeadLetteringOnMessageExpiration
member.summary: A value that indicates whether this queue has dead letter support when a message expires.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.DefaultMessageTimeToLive
member.summary: ISO 8601 default message timespan to live value. This is the duration after which the message expires, starting from when the message is sent to Service Bus. This is the default value used when TimeToLive is not set on a message itself.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.ForwardDeadLetteredMessagesTo
member.summary: Queue/Topic name to forward the Dead Letter message.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.ForwardTo
member.summary: Queue/Topic name to forward the messages.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.LockDuration
member.summary: ISO 8601 timespan duration of a peek-lock; that is, the amount of time that the message is locked for other receivers. The maximum value for LockDuration is 5 minutes; the default value is 1 minute.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.MaxDeliveryCount
member.summary: The maximum delivery count. A message is automatically deadlettered after this number of deliveries. default value is 10.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.RequiresSession
member.summary: A value that indicates whether the queue supports the concept of sessions.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.Rules
member.summary: The rules for this subscription.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.ToProvisioningEntity
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a provisioning entity.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource.WriteJsonObjectProperties(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter)
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a JSON object.
member.param: The Utf8JsonWriter to write the JSON object to.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Topic. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource)
member.summary: Represents a Service Bus Topic. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.TopicName
member.summary: The topic name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure Service Bus resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure Service Bus Topic.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.DefaultMessageTimeToLive
member.summary: ISO 8601 default message timespan to live value. This is the duration after which the message expires, starting from when the message is sent to Service Bus. This is the default value used when TimeToLive is not set on a message itself.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.DuplicateDetectionHistoryTimeWindow
member.summary: ISO 8601 timeSpan structure that defines the duration of the duplicate detection history. The default value is 10 minutes.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.RequiresDuplicateDetection
member.summary: A value indicating if this topic requires duplicate detection.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.Subscriptions
member.summary: The subscriptions for this topic.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.ToProvisioningEntity
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a provisioning entity.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource.WriteJsonObjectProperties(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter)
member.summary: Converts the current instance to a JSON object.
member.param: The Utf8JsonWriter to write the JSON object to.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.ServiceBus.ConfigFileAnnotation
member.summary: Represents an annotation for a custom config file source.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.ServiceBus.ConfigJsonAnnotation
member.summary: Represents an annotation for updating the JSON content of a mounted document.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure Service Bus resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddAzureServiceBus(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Namespace resource to the application model. This resource can be used to create queue, topic, and subscription resources.
member.param: The builder for the distributed application.
The name of the resource.
member.remarks:
By default references to the Azure Service Bus resource will be assigned the following roles:
-
These can be replaced by calling .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddQueue(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Queue resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus resource builder.
The name of the queue resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddServiceBusQueue(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Queue resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus resource builder.
The name of the queue resource.
The name of the Service Bus Queue. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithProperties(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusQueueResource})
member.summary: Allows setting the properties of an Azure Service Bus Queue resource.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus Queue resource builder.
A method that can be used for customizing the .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddTopic(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Topic resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus resource builder.
The name of the topic resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddTopic(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Topic resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus resource builder.
The name of the topic resource.
The name of the subscriptions.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddServiceBusTopic(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Topic resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus resource builder.
The name of the topic resource.
The name of the Service Bus Topic. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithProperties(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource})
member.summary: Allows setting the properties of an Azure Service Bus Topic resource.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus Topic resource builder.
A method that can be used for customizing the .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddSubscription(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Subscription resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus resource builder.
The name of the topic resource.
The name of the subscription.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.AddServiceBusSubscription(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusTopicResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Service Bus Subscription resource to the application model.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus Topic resource builder.
The name of the subscription resource.
The name of the Service Bus Subscription. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithProperties(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource})
member.summary: Allows setting the properties of an Azure Service Bus Subscription resource.
member.param: The Azure Service Bus Subscription resource builder.
A method that can be used for customizing the .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.RunAsEmulator(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusEmulatorResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure Service Bus resource to be emulated. This resource requires an to be added to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithConfigurationFile(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusEmulatorResource},System.String)
member.summary: Copies the configuration file into an Azure Service Bus emulator resource.
member.param: The builder for the .
Path to the file on the AppHost where the emulator configuration is located.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithConfiguration(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusEmulatorResource},System.Action{System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonNode})
member.summary: Alters the JSON configuration document used by the emulator.
member.param: The builder for the .
A callback to update the JSON object representation of the configuration.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithHostPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusEmulatorResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the host port for the Azure Service Bus emulator is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.
member.param: Builder for the Azure Service Bus emulator container
The port to bind on the host. If is used, a random port will be assigned.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureServiceBusExtensions.WithRoleAssignments``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureServiceBusResource},Azure.Provisioning.ServiceBus.ServiceBusBuiltInRole[])
member.summary: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Azure Service Bus namespace. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.
member.param: The resource to which the specified roles will be assigned.
The target Azure Service Bus namespace.
The built-in Service Bus roles to be assigned.
member.returns: The updated with the applied role assignments.
